tasks.question: Nick Wilde (sell) fake popsicles, but now he works as a police officer.
Nick Wilde (think) the police were bad, but now he is part of the police team.
Nick Wilde (work) alone, but now he works with Judy Hopps.
Judy Hopps (believe) she could solve every problem quickly.
Judy Hopps (live) with her big family on the farm.
Judy Hopps (feel) small in the big city, but she never gave up.
Nick Wilde (laugh) at Judy Hopps, but later he became her best friend and partner.
Flash (make) everyone wait a long time at the queue.
Chief Bogo (give) Judy only small parking tickets to check.
The snake Gary (scare) people, but he just wanted to have fun.
Yax (relax) at the naturalist club and talk about nature all day.
Bellwether (look) friendly and helpful, but later everyone learned the truth about her.
Judy Hopps (believe) every animal in the city was kind.
Nick Wilde (never, think) he could become a police officer.
